title: A resolution to recognize and celebrate the 30th anniversary of the Denver International Airport.
stage_label: Referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. (consideration: CR S1433)
crs_summary: This resolution recognizes February 28th, 2025, as the 30th anniversary of Denver International Airport in Denver, Colorado.
last_action_text: Referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. (consideration: CR S1433)
